name: Example: per-resource requirement
description: Template extension showing how a country/sector regulator declares a requirement that applies to an individual RESOURCE (not the provider). An admin verifies it, and the resource stays hidden from the public catalogue until it passes. Inert by default: appliesWhen targets jurisdiction 'ZZ' (unassigned) so it matches nothing. Copy this folder and change appliesWhen (providerJurisdiction / resourceSectors / resourceKinds) to activate it for your jurisdiction.
